title: Automations, loading some at a time or having pages to show all

posts.author: keeleybaxter (keeley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Could you please add an update in the future where it only loads 10-20 automations at a time on a board? Whether this be on pages or as you scroll?

At present, we are having issues with boards that have a big chunk of automations and feel if it only loaded 10-20 at a time it would decrease the lag and make things load much quicker.

One of our boards has around 600 automations which cant be cut down and its becoming near impossible to load the automations or add any more.

Therefore could this please be added
